programme.title: 'Come out! Come out! Come out!' Fifty years of gay liberation | Generation HIV: the young Britons born HIV positive
programme.desc: On the 50th anniversary of the partial decriminalisation of homosexuality, Owen Jones speaks to a man imprisoned for his sexuality and the activists and campaigners who have fought for LGBTQ rights and equality. From the Sexual Offences Act 1967, to section 28 and the Aids epidemic in the 1980s, to the equal marriage rights obtained in 2013, he discovers how much progress LGBT communities have made – and how far there is still to travel. | In Britain there's a unique group of young people who've had HIV all their lives. They were born in the 90s, when mother-to-child transmission couldn't be prevented, but HIV positive babies could survive.

programme.title: The Tower next door
programme.desc: In June 2017 residents of the Silchester estate woke to discover Grenfell Tower engulfed in flames, witnessing a terrifying national tragedy unfolding on their doorstep. The tower bore a striking resemblance to their own. The victims were people they knew, people from all walks of life who, like them, made a home for themselves high up above the clamour of the city. Faced with an uncertain future, the residents of the tower next door are fighting to rebuild their community.

programme.title: Emotional support animals
programme.sub-title: Creature comforts: has the US's emotional support animal epidemic gone too far?
programme.desc: Emotional support animals, or ESAs, have exploded across the US in recent years, with rising numbers of pet owners getting their animals certified online. Unlike in the UK, ESAs have legal status in the US on a tier below traditional service animals, but the backlash has begun – with critics complaining the system is being abused by regular pet owners who want to take their animals into unsuitable public spaces.

programme.title: The internet warriors
programme.desc: Who are the people that get so angry online? Meet the internet warriors, in their own homes.

programme.title: Going undiagnosed' due to gender bias | Nuclear Narnia
programme.desc: Meet Saffron: inside the colourful mind of a girl with autism. | Sellafield's controversial history dates back to the Cold War, when the huge industrial site played a crucial role in the UK's development of nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A video journalism project examining poverty, inequality and the challenges our communities face in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic.

programme.title: Sprinter Factory
programme.desc: These are the girls running as fast as they can to be Jamaica's new sprint champions in a country obsessed with its athletes. This is the story of the Champs national youth athletics competition that could change their lives.

programme.title: Blood, sweat and fears: special report on abuse towards grassroots football referees
programme.desc: The FA has rebooted its Respect Campaign this season to protect grassroots referees in England but many continue to suffer both mental and physical abuse. There are some horrifying stories but hope remains: as of 2019-20 season a new sin-bin system will be rolled out across all grassroots leagues for anybody caught abusing a referee, with other initiatives also in the pipeline.

programme.title: Dwarfism and me: 'We're still treated as less than human'
programme.desc: About 90,000 people in America have dwarfism. The writer and podcaster Cara Reedy takes us on a journey to reflect on what it means to be a person with dwarfism – and why America's obsession with little people has left lasting damage.

programme.title: Ireland's forgotten mixed-race child abuse victims
programme.desc: Rosemary Adaser was one of many mixed-race children considered illegitimate who was brought up in institutions run by the Catholic church in Ireland between the 1950s and 1970s. She tells of the abuse and racist treatment she suffered, and returns to her school in Kilkenny for the first time in 40 years and attempts to answer questions about her past.

programme.title: Buyers Club
programme.desc: In 2013, a cure was found for hepatitis C. It could save millions of lives, but its price tag of between $40,000 and $84,000 for 84 pills puts it far out of most patients' reach. However, in India, a generic version of the drug is available for less than $1,000. Denied the affordable medication he needed, Greg Jefferys defied the US pharmaceutical company that holds the patent to set up a worldwide supply network for the generic version.

programme.title: Super Dogs | The remarkable urban photographs of David Levene
programme.desc: Super dogs: the race to win America's most famous dog show | City: the remarkable urban photographs of David Levene

programme.title: Our House
programme.desc: Brian was down on his luck and sleeping rough in Liverpool. Lawrence was a successful hotelier and property developer. David was a self-proclaimed hippy in a dead-end job. Together they formed an unlikely alliance and created a homeless shelter like no other. But can it last?

programme.title: Ben´s Menu

programme.title: Ben´s Menu

programme.title: Ben´s Menu

programme.title: Ben´s Menu

programme.title: Ben´s Menu

programme.title: Ben´s Menu

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E11

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E12
programme.desc: Tony's familiarity with his job is breeding contempt among the neighborhood housekeepers and disharmony between him and Angela.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E13
programme.desc: Angela helps Tony to deal with his father's memory -- and an apartment filled with his father's memorabilia -- providing Tony and Samantha with their best Christmas ever.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E14
programme.desc: When Mona is evicted from her apartment, Tony tries to promote family unity by getting her to move in with Angela...and nearly destroys family relations permanently.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E15
programme.desc: When Angela's long-lost adventurer husband returns from the jungle, that old romantic magic makes Angela's divorce plans disappear...along with Tony's job.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E16
programme.desc: The romantic bliss between Angela and her estranged husband seems to be wearing thin and Tony's perfect new job is leaving something to be desired - an unexpected reconciliation could be in the offing.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E17
programme.desc: Tony and Angela have a lot of explaining to do when television's "Eye on Hartford" discovers them in a rather compromising position.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E18
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Samantha may never be able to show her face in school again after Tony volunteers to be a chaperon at her first school dance and then gets caught kissing her teacher.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E19
programme.desc: Tony is suspicious of his father-in-law's motives and means when, out of nowhere, he arrives on Angela's doorstep and lavishes Samantha with expensive gifts.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E20
programme.desc: Angela is worried that the stories Tony has been telling about his childhood pranks are the cause of Jonathan's strange behavior changes.

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E21
programme.desc: Tony and Samantha must come to grips with the affluence of their community when Samantha desperately wants to go on a ski trip that Tony can't afford. Director: Asaad Keleda

programme.title: Who's The Boss? S1E22
programme.desc: Temptation threatens to singe employer/employee relationships when Angela and Tony find themselves alone "celebrating" Angela's birthday.

programme.title: William Shatner's Weird Or What
programme.desc: Could a bizarre machine reveal the secrets of teleportation? In Mexico, an explorer finds a crystal skull he believes could open the way to another universe - is he right?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: The past few decades have been filled with stunning technological advancement. Animal cloning has been a reality for decades but the disturbing experiments going on behind close doors will shock you.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Is this half man, half ape simply a figment of our collective imagination or does he really exist? As the evidence begins to pile up maybe we should be asking - who has been keeping this from us?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines whether the United States has been involved in a secret conflict with alien forces for the past fifty years. It looks at the Battle of Los Angeles and the Roswell Incident. It also discusses the theory that President Eisenhower made a treaty with alien race.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines whether time travel is real and, if it is, whether it is under the control of a mysterious elite. It examines the mysterious South Fork Bridge photo which purports to show a man out of time. It also looks at theories that claim that the Nazis developed a time travel device during World War II.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: The Great Deceiver. Seducer of the masses. The Bringer of Armageddon. Every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days. But who is this Anti-Christ?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: We rely on machines for virtually every aspect of modern life. Have we reached the point where we need them more than they need us? There may be a time where we are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines whether the United States government is preparing for a possible alien attack. It looks at a recent report of a joint naval mission by the U.S. and China to combat a hostile alien force over the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files looks at some of the secret government warehouses of the United States. It looks at Fort Knox gold depository and asks whether the gold there has been removed. It also examines Hangar 18 at Wright Patterson Air Force base in Ohio and whether it contains crashed alien craft or the Nazi Die Glocke.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines a conspiracy that may be seeking to eradicate 90% of the world's population. It looks at the Georgia Guidestones built by an unknown architect which call for humanity to reduce its population to below 500 million.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines whether the United State military has constructed flying saucers. It looks at unclassified documents describing Project 1794 and a supersonic large disk fighter aircraft. These plans are later developed by a Canadian company Avro Aircraft into the Avrocar.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files looks at a number of end-of-the-world scenarios and considers the inevitability of doomsday. It also looks at the question of whether world governments would conspire with each other to cover up knowledge of the end-of-the-world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: There is a battle going on for your mind. From the Cold War to the TV set, someone wants to control what you think, how you act and what you believe. We'll reveal the new practices in mind control.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Since the dawn of man, the few have tried to control the fate of the many. But is there really an elite group of power brokers trying to rule the planet? And if so, who is behind this New World Order?

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This episode, a new Robot Wars champion will emerge! Sparks and scraps are sure to fly in this explosive series finale. Winners will have to make it through the four-way melees and head-to-head battles to be able to prove themselves in the final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots come to the arena to try and best the challenges that await, including Skittles, where they must act as an autonomous bowling ball to knock over as many barrels as they can, whilst trying to avoid the house robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Competitors have a chance to go head-to-head with a house robot in a test of strength and strategy in this week's trial, tug of war. Winners progress to the next round, losers take a face first dive into the pit.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This week's trial takes the competitors back in time to medieval England, where they will joust against an unyielding house robot in hopes of winning a chance at the crown. The house robots team up to take down an unlucky competitor in the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Football returns to the arena in this week's trial, complete with ferocious tackles, flamethrowers and own goals. In the semi-final, three of the house robots turn the arena into a barbeque.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Competitors need to hold their own in King of the Castle, where they must defend a circle in the arena against the unforgiving house robots. How many will survive to make it to the semi-finals? A winner is decided by the pit in this week's final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: House robot, Shunt goes head-to-head with the competitors. It's his job to remove the competitors from the ring by any means necessary in this week's trial, Sumo. Will Shunt do the house robots proud, or will the competitors give him the slip?

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E5
programme.desc: When a Dark Fae casino owner is nearly wiped out by an inexplicably lucky human, he offers Bo (Anna Silk) a chance to learn about her past in exchange for her help. And after Bo and Dyson (Kris Holden-Ried) are pitted against an evil Fae with body-snatching powers, a teenage oracle's glimpse into Bo's past reveals the chilling truth about her missing Fae mother.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E6
programme.desc: When Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) unwittingly eats the remains of a contaminated corpse, Bo (Anna Silk) and Lauren (Zoie Palmer) must find a cure for her deadly case of hemorrhagic fever before it's too late.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E7
programme.desc: When she's unwittingly bitten by a powerful Fae spider, Kenzi's (Ksenia Solo) paranoid delusions turn her against Bo (Anna Silk). And as Lauren (Zoie Palmer) calls in an exterminator to end the spider's killing spree, Dyson (Kris Holden-Ried) must act fast to keep his friends from being wiped out, too.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E8
programme.desc: Bo's freelance work earns her a lead on someone who might know something about her mother... but the trail ends at Lou Ann, a death row inmate who claims not to know anything about Bo. Desperate to prove otherwise, and increasingly convinced Lou Ann is innocent Bo uses all her political wiles to try and bust her out of jail. When she has to admit defeat, Bo's goal switches to one of personal vengeance: to find Vex, the Fae that framed Lou Ann, and make him pay.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E9
programme.desc: When a Banshee's cry foretells Sean Kavanaugh's (guest star Randal Edwards) imminent death, Bo (Anna Silk) and Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) are enlisted in his plan to reconcile with his estranged brother. Meanwhile, Dyson (Kris Holden-Ried) presses Trick (Richard Howland) to reveal the secrets of Bo's Fae lineage.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E10
programme.desc: As an investigation into a young woman's mysterious suicide leads Bo (Anna Silk) to an experienced succubus named Saskia (guest star Inga Cadranel), Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) is recruited to help Trick (Rick Howland) recover a valuable Fae artifact he's lost.

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist
programme.desc: Single-mom Laurie is stuck in the past, and so is the eerie, oddball house she shares with her three kids. Featuring a mishmash of colors and styles, and rooms that don't look loved, Laurie admits the home needs to be rescued from her past design mistakes and overall domestic chaos. And after an ambush at a speed dating event, Colin and Justin vow to make the family fall back in love with their home. (S2 E20)

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist
programme.desc: Home fashion-victims Marianne and Daryl have thrown together pieces from every era. And beyond the cracking, yellow walls, their hideous, around-the-world interiors feature Dynasty-era furnishings, a safari-inspired staircase and accessories, and a boy's room that doubles as a busy computer station. After an ambush at the couple's yoga studio, Colin and Justin promise to intervene. And in addition to a Parisian-style master bedroom, an opulent ‘Coco couture' living space, and special surprises for the kids, the design masters promise to teach their charges about optimal art placement and about creating a ‘wow factor.' (S2 E21)

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist
programme.desc: Paul and Lisa's dark and dreary home could double as an inner-city mole hole. Their lackluster interiors feature hideous granny furnishings, a sexless master bedroom, and a depressing basement playroom for their kids. And in spite of their best intentions, they haven't done a thing since they moved in. After an ambush at the zoo (from high atop an elephant), Colin and Justin vow to transform the couple's cave-house into a family-friendly, country-style manor oozing with elegance. (S2 E22)

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist
programme.desc: In the Cohen family's spacious but boring home, there's plenty of room but a severe shortage of style. Lost in time and space, the grand but bland interiors feature garish collectibles, an unsightly mish-mash of furniture, and miles of charm-free, cadaver-colored floor and walls. After an ambush on their son's university campus, Colin and Justin unveil their plan to ditch the kitsch, and bring in the glamour. (S2 E23)

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist
programme.desc: The Fernandez family is young and upbeat… But their gloomy, Italian-style dream home is bringing them down. Beyond the dusty old organ, balloon curtains, and ghastly collectibles (including a petrified wedding cake), their sprawling interiors feature an array of hideous leather chesterfields, and miles and miles of tile. After an ambush in the pumpkin patch, Colin and Justin vow to transform the family's home from all tile to all style, with bright, ‘smart casual' interiors. (S2 E24)

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits Mary King's Close in Edinburgh's Old Town, once home to hundreds of tenants until eventually sealed up. Many of its residents died of the plague, and a fire raged in 1750 - a child's head, a severed arm, and a little girl in a blue dress are just some of the apparitions reported.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team of paranormal experts visits Cornwall to spend 24 hours in the Wellington Hotel, originally a 17th-century coaching inn and now reportedly haunted by the ghost of Thomas Hardy and other spirits.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit the Guild Hall in Leicester, which may be haunted by a wide range of spirits thanks to its use as a police headquarters, a town hall, and a school.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team investigate the 13th-century Manor House Restaurant, where several former residents are still buried on-site, and a sealed room causes suspected paranormal activity after being reopened.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah, and the team visit the Chough Hotel in Somerset to investigate paranormal activity at the location. There are several stories of ghost sightings by the regulars, such as 'shadowy figures' in the corridors and a sighting of a nasty old man by the fireplace.

programme.desc: Lisa meets off-grid desert nomads turning to this lifestyle out of necessity rather than choice. Van Life rebels rule in Slab City, while in Nevada, Bob Wells - the godfather of Van Life - helps thousands turn to nomadic life when in dire straits.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: Continuing his adventure in Cambodia, the Travel Bug finds himself in the rural parts of the country before heading to Siem Reap and the chaos of the city. He then flies to Japan to start a couple of weeks traversing the Land of the Rising Sun.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.sub-title: Japan (Takayama to Kanazawa)" Japan (Takayama to Kanazawa)
programme.desc: Morgan visit's one of Japan's biggest festivals in the beautiful city of Takayama. Here he gets a taste of the old world before exploring the wilderness of the country's interior and visits places few westerners ever explore.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.sub-title: Japan (Kanazawa to Osaka)" Japan (Kanazawa to Osaka)

programme.title: Country House Rescue

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe looks at ways scientists are measuring the health of our forests. In New England, he visits a white pine forest that is being threatened by invasive plants. At the University of California Santa Cruz, he discovers how students are using sonic-tomography to look inside trees to detect signs of disease. At the Pine Barrens of New Jersey, he discovers why the pitch pine tree is able to withstand occasional wildfires. And in Los Angeles, he discovers how volunteers are planting trees to create an urban forest. (S3 E09)

programme.title: Epic Idaho

programme.title: USA Through Food

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: In El Paso, Texas, Raheim coaches new mom and aspiring mountain biker Isabel as she rides rocky desert descents in the Franklin Mountains. Then, Raheim visits an ancient bouldering field, Hueco Tanks, home to wild west graffiti and rock art. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: In Tucson, Arizona, Raheim challenges amateur climber Shelly to abandon her ropes and fears and attempt her most ambitious climb yet at Cochise Stronghold, an historic granite mountain filled with native culture and significance. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe visits Yosemite National Park and explores the famous cliffs, including El Capitan and Half-Dome. Then he heads to the Mariposa Grove, which has 500 giant sequoia trees, and looks at wildlife that thrives in various ecosystems at Yosemite. (S2 E01)

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet

(S2 E08)

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation

programme.title: Get Out of Town

programme.title: Get Out of Town

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Deal with a wakeful lion, stalk an elusive elephant, and tend a weak baby rhino.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Keep tabs on an ER patient, an injured Cape buffalo, and poacher-proofed rhinos.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Join Hope's scramble to save a litter of orphaned fox pups.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, where Chris treats a duck, a goat, and a wolfhound.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: See Chris care for a beloved cat, a gluttonous collie, and a huge crocodile.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Deal with a diabetic terrier, an emotional reunion, and a memorable emergency.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Look for a pup who can do double duty as a pet and helper for a boy with autism.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Seek out a friendly buddy, like a cockapoo or a shichon, for a shy little boy.

programme.title: Queen of Denmark
programme.desc: Over the past 50 years, H.M. Queen Margrethe II of Denmark has met countless foreign heads of state. In this unique documentary series several of them share their memories and encounters with the Queen over the last 50 years.

programme.title: The Private Lives of the Habsburg Rulers
programme.desc: This new Heritage Austria production gives three women a chance to have their say, providing an unrivalled insight into the life of the Habsburgs: the closest servant of Empress Maria Theresa, Carolina Countess Fuchs-Mollard, the friend of Emperor Franz Joseph Katharina Schratt and the daughter of Crown Prince Rudolf, Archduchess Elisabeth, who found her way to becoming a women's rights campaigner and went down in history as the "red Erzsi". Three actresses, Petra Morzé, Stephanie Schmiderer and Gigga Neunteufel, slip into the three historical roles and present the ladies at key moments in their lives: on the day Joseph II was born, after the assassination of Empress Elisabeth and on the day the First Republic was founded. All three biographies offer keyhole perspectives into the very personal lives of the ruling family.

programme.title: Akhanaten and Nefertiti
programme.desc: Explore the mysterious Egyptian ruler Akhenaten in this documentary series. Overthrowing the old gods, the pharaoh built temples across the country in the name of Aton. Was Akhenaten a great revolutionary on Egypt's throne, or were their greater powers controlling his legacy? Generations to come dubbed Akhenaton "the criminal of Amarna", for what he accomplished in Egypt had seemed impossible. He overthrew the old gods and replaced them with one figure: Aton. He dedicated temples throughout the land to Aton, constructing a new home for the god. At the side of the king was Nefertiti, one of the most beautiful and mysterious women in antiquity. She supported her husband's faith and became, with him, one of the most important evangelists of the new god.

programme.title: Windsor Castle: Behind The Walls
programme.desc: Windsor Castle has witnessed royal triumphs and tragedies for over 80 years. In 1936, Elizabeth's future changed with her uncle's abdication, making her father King. During WWII, the castle was a refuge for Elizabeth and Margaret, where she began her royal duties. After a devastating fire in 1992, the royals modernized their image, leading to Windsor's revival by 2016 for the Queen's 90th birthday.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Getting Out the Vote
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya for Heartlake High Class President. But when Tanya resorts to dirty tricks, Stephanie decides to give her a taste of her own medicine. Elect Tanya as Heartlake High Class President?! "NOOOOOOOO!!!!" Not if Friends Stephanie, Emma, Olivia, Mia and Andrea can help it. The Friends are there to help their pal Matthew defeat Tanya -- even when Emma gets carried off by "Vote For Matthew" balloons! But Tanya figures since "Daddy" is now the Mayor of Heartlake City, she doesn't have to play by the rules. When she sneakily sabotages Matthew's campaign, it's time for a determined Stephanie to take his place as candidate. With the help of her friends, Stephanie is set on running a clean campaign -- that is, until Tanya resorts to more dirty tricks, and Stephanie decides to give Tanya a taste of her own medicine.

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: undying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma's brute and worse - the boys locker room!innocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- a BFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew's frantic race against time when Emma discovers that her As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? More text that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma's twisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! The they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angry Friends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into a phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,

programme.title: The Grateful Dud
programme.desc: At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a teen bulldozer named Fiona. But when Fiona's pushy, over-the-top appreciation makes Mia's life a living nightmare, the Friends must Ride To The Rescue! At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a brassy teen bulldozer named Fiona. Although Fiona means well, her pushy, over-the-top appreciation soon makes Mia's life a living nightmare: embarrassing Mia at school, scaring away her boyfriend, and causing major havoc at the Country Club. The Friends must find a way for Mia to escape Fiona's nonstop gratitude and foil Tanya's sneaky schemes to get Mia kicked out of the club. And when a crisis erupts at the club's Fall Ball and Horse Show, all the Friends have to do some fancy riding to help their BFF save the day.

programme.title: Black Out
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd. After destroying the Power Station, the Ninja have dealt a massive blow to the Nindroids, but find getting back to the city troublesome without power. At the Junk Yard, Zane gives half of his heart to revive Pixal to help give guidance in their greater mission. Meanwhile, a mysterious cloaked Interloper steals the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord and creates a new foe for the Ninja to fight… Tech Wu. On the other side of Ninjago, Lloyd is trained by his father to harness his Golden Power to unlock an even greater potential – the power of the First Spinjtzu Master.

programme.title: The Curse Of The Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas' search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd. The Ninja return to a powerless New Ninjago City and visit the Serpentine Tombs in effort to solve who had taken the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord – only to discover the snakes have gone straight. They learn of Serpentine Lore that a Golden Master will conquer all of Ninjago. The Nindroids attack, but with the help from Scales and his Serpentine ilk, they fight off the enemy and discover the culprit they are after is none other than Pythor! But it's too late… the Digital Overlord and his henchman have captured Lloyd in a plot to sap his Golden Power to finally become flesh.

programme.title: Enter The Digiverse
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive. Unable to save Lloyd in time, the Ninja resort to drastic measures. With the help from Borg's advanced technology, the Ninja get digitized with their Techno Blades into the Digiverse in order to battle the Digital Overlord on his own turf and erase evil for good. While the Ninja learn new capabilities and explore the fantasy of a ‘digital world', their friends must protect them from Pythor and his army in the ‘real world'. In the climatic conclusion, the Ninja ‘reboot the system' and save Sensei Wu and Lloyd, but the Digital Overlord has managed to become flesh in the nick of time, only to be in a weakened state.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend. The loss of Zane has fractured the team of Ninja, but when a mysterious invitation to Master Chen's ‘Tournament of Elements' arrives, everything is thrown into question – Is Zane alive, and are there others out there with powers like them? Sensei Garmadon warns them not to trust Master Chen, but they go in order to find Zane and make the team whole. On route to the island, the Ninja are briefly introduced to the other unique fighters with elemental powers, and the mysterious and beautiful Skylor intrigues Kai. Kai gets into a humbling scrap with Karlof, the Master of Metal, and learns some fights must be done on your own.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Cheat Code
programme.desc: Competing over who can ask Zoey to join their Sheep Week team, Logan cheats and unwittingly endangers the video game based Cyber Realm.

programme.title: The Bigger Picture
programme.desc: When the kids meddle in their teacher's dream to find test answers, they realize that in dreams, sweet little Ms. Putnam isn't so sweet... or little!

programme.title: Beasts And Dragons, Rise Of Garmadon
programme.desc: Zane, Jay, and Kai remember some of Ninjago's fearsome creatures so that Cole defend the cave from an unidentified monster. But Ninja confront memories of their greatest villain and ally, Garmadon, before the threat to Zane controls him completely.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Rhinox is contaminated with an energon depleting virus.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Bots go on a satellite repair mission and their carelessly discarded trash hurtles around Earth's orbit.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: This Is Why I Hate Machines
programme.desc: Sentinel Prime has Jazz pilot the Elite Guard ship through a space storm.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots discover Omega Supreme's energy signal on the Moon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Recruits travel deep underwater to find an unmanned submersible.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: There's no 'I' in team.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An out-of-control mechanical bull leads Cody and the Bots on an adventure.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A new central computer is designed to keep everyone in Griffin Rock 100% safe, no matter what.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet, experimenting with synthetic Energon, becomes a menace to everyone.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron's attempt to fulfill an ancient Cybertronian prophecy.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth has becomed plagued by natural disasters due to Dark Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A weekend's camping trip to the valley below the dam goes wrong when a violent storm moves in.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobot Blurr joins the team, but proves himself not much of a team player.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons trick the population into believing they are "Sky Gods".

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator against the Decepticons.

programme.title: Queen Smurfette
programme.desc: Smurfette becomes Queen for a day on her birthday. But this gets out of hand when Father Time falls asleep, neglecting to end the days. Tempers begin to flare among the Smurfs, who are tired of servitude. Papa rushes to wake Father Time and brings peace again to Smurfland.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf On Wood: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lure Of The Orb: Allura the Enchantress possesses a very special magic orb whose energy, as she says, can lift spirits and inspire the uninspired! All you have to do is hold the orb between your hands... It is true the orb bestows inspiration, up to a point. But its side effects can be very dangerous, as the Smurfs find out when they become addicted to it...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bubble, Bubble, Smurfs In Trouble: Each morning, dew is deposited by water sprites on forest leaves. Wait till you see what happens when Scaredy Smurf gets hold of the dew-making magic wand...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Flying Bed: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Grouchy Makes A Splash: We all know Grouchy Smurf hates a lot of things. But one thing he hates more than anything else is water, when there is enough of it to drown in. You see, Grouchy can't swim. And when the Smurfs notice this peculiarity and try to teach him how to survive in water, the evil wizard Gargamel makes things a little more dangerous than they ought to be....

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lure Of The Orb: Allura the Enchantress possesses a very special magic orb whose energy, as she says, can lift spirits and inspire the uninspired! All you have to do is hold the orb between your hands... It is true the orb bestows inspiration, up to a point. But its side effects can be very dangerous, as the Smurfs find out when they become addicted to it...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfic Games: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fountain Of Smurf: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Unsound Smurf: In an effort to give Papa some quiet time, Brainy uses one of Papa's spells to create a magical sound barrier around the village. Papa cannot reverse the spell and sends the Smurflings, who are trapped outside the Village, to a noisemaker. Baby takes a bottle of sound from the noisemaker, which breaks the barrier.

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes the Teletubbies laugh. They watch some children exploring the colour green. The Teletubbies love green.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies play walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy says "Eh-oh" and runs off to find the other Tubbies. They watch some children make fantastic animals from papermache.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play 'Boo', but stop to watch Ned help his dad plant and water some geraniums. In Teletubbyland, nine pretty flowers and a watering can appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree under a cloud. Andy Brown and some children visit some giraffes. The animals march through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland. Po knocks the string in to the air with her scooter and it makes a stringy mess all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: After a storm on the Island of Sodor, a landslide unearths some very unusual footprints. Thomas and Percy are eager to find out what could have made them, but danger seems to appear around every bend!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It is Flynn the Fire Engine's first day out on the road, having had his road wheels fixed by Victor. Now Flynn can roll on the roads as well as the tracks! But Flynn isn't happy...

programme.desc: It is Flynn the Fire Engine's first day out on the road, having had his road wheels fixed by Victor. Now Flynn can roll on the roads as well as the tracks! But Flynn isn't happy...

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's a bad day on Misty Island. Ol' Wheezy has stopped working! The Logging Locos don't know what to do and that makes them sad. Thomas is sure he can help!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's a big day on Sodor! Sir Topham Hatt's mother, Dowager Hatt, is having a 'Welcome to Sodor' party and she has invited some Very Important Visitors.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: On the Island of Sodor, the fog is beginning to swirl in to Brendam Docks. Percy is there waiting for cargo and listening to one of Salty's tales! It's about the Monster of Brendam!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: The snow is lying thick on the ground in Sodor and Henry really doesn't like the snow! Charlie decides to show Henry that snow really can be fun!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's Thomas' turn to work with his good friend Whiff the Rubbish Engine! He has to be Whiff's back engine and push a very heavy rubbish train.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: At the farm, Farmer McColl needs help. His scarecrow is old and has to go to be mended. This means there is nothing to scare away the crows and Farmer McColl doesn't know what to do!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Gordon the Grand Engine doesn't feel so grand when he bashes into some cars at the Docks - and his buffer falls off!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Percy and Diesel have been given a very unusual job! They must pick up a very heavy and very big, old organ: a calliope.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves. (S1 E04)

However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.desc: When sprinklers unexpectedly interrupt their soccer game, Chelsea and her friends must take cover in a small playhouse. Chelsea's mind wanders to Dreamtopia, where she joins Rainbow Queen Barbie in an underwater adventure. (S1 E108)

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia Series
programme.desc: While Chelsea works with Otto on a puzzle, his know-it-all attitude has her wishing for a friend who is just like her. In Dreamtopia, Apprentice Queen Barbie grants that wish, but accidentally creates three Chelsea clones. (S1 E109)

programme.title: Who Gets the Dog?
programme.desc: A couple going through a divorce squabble over custody of their beloved dog.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Lez Bomb
programme.desc: Lez Bomb is a hilarious and sweet “coming out” comedy in the vein of Meet the Parents from Bobby Farrelly, producer of There's Something about Mary. Lauren, (Writer-Director Jenna Laurenzo) comes home with life changing news. As it turns out, there is no good time to drop the Lez Bomb.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.
